commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=aed9df81efc419d16a638564ee69b687d74f23ca)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in Telegram `streaming.progress.persistProgress` behavior for persisted or accumulated tool/commentary progress, wires CLI commentary into channel progress, updates config/docs, and adds regression tests.

PR surface: Source +302, Tests +488, Docs +1, Generated 0. Total +791 across 22 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: with `streaming.mode: "off"` plus `persistProgress`, accumulated progress is flushed only from `deliverFinalAnswerText`, while supported media-only finals have no text segments and go through the direct final send path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can move the flush to cover media-only final delivery and add the missing dispatcher regression, though maintainers still need to settle the stacked feature chain before merge.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
